name: Easy Crockpot Beef Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chuck or other cut beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef in the crockpot.
2. Add sliced onion, chopped garlic, sliced carrots, diced celery, stewed tomatoes, and Lipton Onion/Mushroom Soup.
3. Stir in Kitchen Bouquet, Worcestershire sauce, and mushrooms (if using).
4. Cover and cook on low for 8 hours or high for 4-5 hours until the beef is tender.
5. Serve hot.
